tutorialBundle.name: Connection Assistant
tutorialBundle.welcome:
Connection Assistant is not supported when the Adb Server is manually managed. To view or change the Adb Server configuration, go to Settings > Build, Execution, Deployment > Debugger > Adb Server Lifecycle Management.

Note: If you run adb from the terminal on a non-default port, you must specify the server port with the -P flag for all terminal commands (e.g., adb -P 5038 devices).
